creator: erik@tenku.dk
text:
(In reply to Chris Hutchinson from comment #7)
Are the steps involved in this to pull in the old port to a new directory (e.g. the old devel/root), override with my new port specifications and then to follow example 1 in chapter 3 of the Porter’s Handbook (https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/quick-porting/)? Including git-remove’ing any files from the old port which are not needed anymore?
